summary: Iter 5 EligeHub frontend testing of /appuntamenti redesign (per-docente calendar). Tested admin (Marco Bianchi 60min preselected) + Sara Test30 (no orari) + docente@demo.it role + mobile. 12/13 specced behaviors PASS. 1 bug found: top 'Nuovo appuntamento' button does NOT preselect docente from calendar — it always falls back to docenti[0] for admin. Spec explicitly requires 'preseleziona il docente dal calendario (NON più il primo della lista)'.

ui_bugs.issue: Top 'Nuovo appuntamento' button (and cell-click flow) does NOT preselect the docente currently shown in the calendar for admin. Reproduced by: login admin, select 'Sara Test30' in cal-docente-select, click [data-testid=appuntamento-create-button] -> modal opens with Marco Bianchi (first in dropdown) instead of Sara. Same bug affects cell-click flow (false positive in this round because Marco IS docenti[0]).

action_items: Fix /app/frontend/src/pages/Appuntamenti.jsx line 284: change `currentDocenteId={user?.role === "docente" ? user.id : ""}` to `currentDocenteId={user?.role === "docente" ? user.id : selectedDocenteId}` so the modal inherits the calendar's selected docente for admin (both top button and cell click). After fix, re-verify by selecting Sara Test30 -> click top button -> modal must show Sara Test30 (and slot 30 min).
critical_code_review_comments: Console hydration warning: option element contains <span> due to Emergent visual editor instrumentation (x-source-* attrs). Cosmetic dev-only noise — not blocking — but worth ignoring/suppressing.
Grid math verified: Marco Bianchi 60min slot, orari Lun-Ven 9-13 + 15-18 -> exact result 34 verdi + 28 grigie + 1 prenotato (Giulia Neri Ven 9-10). 9 rows (9:00..17:00).

Empty states work: no docente -> 'Seleziona un docente'; docente w/o orari -> 'Nessuna disponibilità configurata' + 'Imposta orari' link with correct href=/orari?docente=ID. Top button correctly disabled when no docente.
Mobile 390x844: calendar has horizontal overflow (clientW=348, scrollW=836) as designed — no functional bug.
Docente role: cal-docente-select correctly HIDDEN; calendar visible immediately for user's own data.
Slot info line displays slot_minuti correctly for both 60min (Marco) and 30min (Sara) docenti.
Cell click correctly opens modal pre-populated with data/dal/al (verified data=2026-06-08, dal=10:00, al=11:00 for Marco's 60min cell).

success_rate.frontend: 92% (12/13 spec items pass; 1 high-priority docente-preselection bug)

seed_data_creation: Sara Test30 docente (slot 30, no orari) already existed from prior iters — no cleanup needed by this agent.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Re-test the modal docente preselection bug specifically: after the main agent fixes Appuntamenti.jsx L284, (1) login admin, (2) navigate /appuntamenti, (3) select Sara Test30 in cal-docente-select, (4) click [data-testid=appuntamento-create-button], (5) assert [data-testid=app-docente-select] value === Sara's id and 'Durata standard: 30 minuti' is shown. Also re-test the same with a Marco green cell click on a NON-first docente if/when one is added. All other Iter 5 specs already verified PASS.
rca of the issue: Root cause: Appuntamenti.jsx line 284 hard-codes `currentDocenteId={user?.role === "docente" ? user.id : ""}`. For admin role this ALWAYS passes empty string, so inside AppuntamentoModal (L304) `initialDocente = currentDocenteId || (isAdmin ? (docenti[0]?.id || "") : "")` falls back to docenti[0].id (first docente alphabetically/insertion-order). The spec explicitly says modal must preselect the calendar docente. Fix is a 1-line change passing `selectedDocenteId` instead of empty string. The cell-click flow also suffers from the same bug — it only worked in this test because the calendar docente Marco happened to coincide with docenti[0].
